title: Roundless Font
description: Resourcepack changes vanilla font to its roundless (square) version
body:
# Roundless Font



A clean pixel font that replaces the standard Minecraft typeface. The main goal of **Roundless** is to smooth out character shapes while staying within the pixel-art aesthetic. It eliminates sharp corners on rounded letters, making the text easier to read during long sessions.

---

### Features
* **Refined Geometry:** Modified glyphs for a "softer" look without losing pixel clarity.
* **Bilingual:** Full support for English (Latin) and Russian (Cyrillic) alphabets.
* **Symbols & Numbers:** Includes a redesigned set of digits and special characters.
* **Readability:** Optimized spacing and character widths for better legibility in menus and chat.

---

### Support the Project
